instruction: A person is flying a kite. The string is fully extended at ${43\ {\rm ft}}$. The hand holding the string is very close to his eyes, which are ${5.5\ {\rm ft}}$ above the ground. When he looks up at the kite, the angle of elevation is $49$ degrees. Find the height of the kite. Round your answer to two decimal places if needed. The height of the kite is [ANS]ft.
